event_evidence: The insurance claim states, the slaves were thrown overboard for the safety of the ship - that there wasn't sufficient water for the cargo and crew to survive the rest of the voyage.
The Zong case is mentioned, referring to the slave ship Zong where slaves were thrown overboard to save drinking water.

evidence_snippets: His POV: a POOR BLACK WOMAN oversees DIDO from afar. CAPTAIN SIR JOHN LINDSAY (CONT'D)
beautiful, regal - stares ahead in shock... LORD MANSFIELD (50's) - a majestic man, white wigged and low brows, is incandescent, his sister, LADY MARY, frozen.
LADY MARY But she IS black!
ceremony. Maids help the Mansfield ladies as they disrobe. ON DIDO as her gaze falls on MABEL (20), a black maid helping ELIZABETH with her hat. A beat as DIDO stiffens.
